summary: Pre-built Campaign Templates feature testing complete. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All template picker and builder integration verified - 5 templates display correctly with metadata, template selection loads builder with correct data, Build Custom skips to empty builder.
critical_code_review_comments: PREBUILT_TEMPLATES constant properly defines all 5 templates with correct step counts
GET /api/campaigns/templates/prebuilt correctly returns summary with step_count, total_duration, trigger_tag
GET /api/campaigns/templates/prebuilt/{id} returns full template including sequences array
_calc_duration helper correctly calculates duration string from delay_days/delay_months
Frontend selectPrebuiltTemplate function correctly maps API response to state
Template picker screen shows all 5 templates with icons, badges (AI, trigger tag, step count, duration)
Build Custom button correctly bypasses templates and shows empty builder
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - templates are hardcoded in backend
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pre-built templates iteration 57 testing complete. Backend endpoints at /api/campaigns/templates/prebuilt (listing) and /api/campaigns/templates/prebuilt/{id} (details) work correctly. Templates: sold_followup (5 steps), be_back_nurture (4 steps), service_reminder (3 steps), referral_thank_you (3 steps), vip_customer_care (4 steps). Frontend template picker at /campaigns/new shows all templates, clicking loads builder with correct name/type/AI toggle/delivery mode/sequences. Build Custom bypasses to empty builder.

mocked_apis.twilio_sms: MOCKED - campaign messages not actually sent via Twilio
